calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Restitution Following Reversal And Interest Thereon
Off Calendar Jan-06-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT FINANCIAL CASUALTY & SURETY, INC'S Motion For Restitution Following Reversal And Interest Thereon is granted. No opposition filed. The prevailing party is to provide a formal form of order.

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489. (302/EG)

MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Aug-26-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT FINANCIAL CASUALTY & SURETY, INC.'S MOTION FOR SET ASIDE SUMMARY JUDGMENT; DISCHARGE FORFEITURE AND EXONERATE BAIL is Granted. No opposition filed. Moving party to prepare a form of order. Judge: Suzanne Bolanos; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter : Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489 =302/sb
